description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist rectangular structure with large, evenly spaced windows on all visible sides. The building is partially open, with sections of the exterior walls missing, revealing a spacious interior. Notably, the house incorporates significant greenery, including several tall coniferous trees planted within the open central courtyard and along the inner walls, suggesting an eco-friendly or biophilic design. The flat roof and clean lines emphasize a contemporary architectural style. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, smooth material, possibly concrete or stucco, with dark window frames providing contrast. The interior is open and airy, with visible planters and minimal furnishings.
description: A modern, rectangular house with large windows, open walls, and tall trees integrated into its central courtyard, emphasizing a blend of architecture and nature.
description_view_0: Front and left sides are visible, showing large windows, open wall sections, and three tall trees inside the courtyard.
description_view_1: Right side and partial front are visible, highlighting the depth of the courtyard and the alignment of windows and trees.
description_view_2: Back and left sides are visible, with a clear view of the open courtyard and the arrangement of trees along the inner wall.
description_view_3: Back and right sides are visible, showing the open rear wall, interior planters, and the tallest tree near the center.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with large glass door, no visible steps or porch, and a clean, open approach.
